testsuite.name: com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.controller.ChatControllerTest

testcase.name: 정산_취소_버튼_상호작용_테스트()

failure.message: Wanted but not invoked: settlementService.updateSettlementResponse( "test-settlement-001", "20000622", "cancelled" ); -> at com.shinhan.heybob.chat.domain.chat.controller.ChatControllerTest.정산_취소_버튼_상호작용_테스트(ChatControllerTest.java:177) Actually, there were zero interactions with this mock.
